name: StableX Technologies, Inc.
summary: StableX Technologies, Inc. (formerly AYRO, Inc.) transitioned in July 2025 from designing and manufacturing compact electric vehicles to a digital asset treasury management model. The company acquires and holds crypto tokens—including FLUID, INJ, LINK, and AAVE—targeting infrastructure and enabling technologies for the stablecoin sector, aiming to acquire up to $100 million in crypto assets to generate yield through capital appreciation.
